settings.editor:
At Smile on Westbury, we believe that exceptional dental care goes beyond treatments and procedures—it’s about building relationships, earning trust, and making every visit a positive experience. Our team is made up of dedicated professionals who are passionate about helping you achieve a healthy, confident smile.

From the moment you step into our office, you’ll be welcomed by a team that values your comfort and well-being. We take the time to listen, educate, and provide personalized care tailored to your unique needs. Whether you're here for a routine checkup, cosmetic enhancements, or restorative treatments, we’re committed to delivering the highest quality of care with a gentle touch and a friendly smile.

Our goal is to create a stress-free, supportive environment where patients of all ages feel at ease. We stay up to date with the latest advancements in dental technology and techniques, ensuring that you receive modern, effective, and comfortable treatments.

With over a decade of experience in the field, Dr. Sorn Yaibuathes is a leading and trusted dental expert, whose journey in dentistry was fueled by a deep understanding from a patient’s perspective. Inspired by her own dental experience in the past, she developed a passion for helping people, combining the artistry and science of dentistry to deliver care tailored to your needs.


Dr. Sorn earned her Doctorate of Dental Surgery from the University of Michigan School of Dentistry. She completed advanced General Practice Residency training at Morristown Medical Center, allowing her to manage dental emergencies and medically complex patients.

As a practicing dentist, she has invested in extensive training at well-renowned dental centers around the country to provide the highest standard of care for all her patients.

TOP 6% OF DENTISTS IN THE COUNTRY
As a Fellow in the Academy of General Dentistry (FAGD), Dr. Sorn is in the top 6 percent of general dentists in the country. She is passionate about staying on the leading edge of dentistry and invests hundreds of hours into ongoing training each year.

AREA OF EXPERTISE
Aesthetic and Family Dentistry, Porcelain Veneers, Composite Veneers, Composite Bonding, Facial Analysis, Full-mouth Rehabilitation, Implant Dentistry, Custom Dentures, Partial Dentures, and TMJ Treatment.

COMMUNITY FOCUSED
As a proud small business owner and a mother, Dr. Sorn is excited is to support fellow small business owners and create meaningful connections with families and friends within Westbury and the surrounding Long Island neighborhoods.

settings.editor: Our dental hygienists are passionate about preventive care, ensuring your teeth and gums stay healthy. They provide gentle yet thorough cleanings and educate patients on the best oral hygiene practices.
From chairside support to making sure every procedure runs smoothly, our dental assistants help create a comfortable and stress-free experience for our patients.

From the moment you walk through our doors, our front office team is here to welcome you with a smile. They handle scheduling, insurance, and any questions you may have, ensuring a seamless visit from start to finish.

Committed to helping you smile confidently.

Experience personalized care, open communication, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere from the moment you arrive.

Empowering smiles with exceptional quality dental care. Through education, advanced techniques, and quality care, we empower patients to maintain confident smiles.

Empowerment
We believe in empowering our patients to achieve and maintain confident smiles through education, guidance, and personalized treatment plans.

Quality
We are committed to delivering the highest standard of dental care, utilizing advanced techniques, modern technology, and quality materials.

Compassion
We approach every interaction with empathy and understanding, creating a warm and welcoming environment where our patients feel cared for.

Integrity
We operate with honesty, transparency, and ethical practices, striving to build trusting relationships with our patients.
Step inside our modern Westbury office, designed with your relaxation and care in mind.
Real stories from real patients. See why families across Westbury trust us with their smiles.
